notes: All 9 responses are strong and consistent (a couple truncated mid-list at higher temps). Common to every response: the Jan CLI path is misrendered as /Users/frederic/local/bin/jan (missing the dot before 'local') — this is a systematic OCR slip, not a hallucination, so it is recorded under key_misses only. Provider 'xAI' is variously written 'xAl' (lowercase-L) — also an OCR misread, not flagged as hallucination per the strict rules. Only t0.4|rep1 invented specific per-item icons (eye/pencil/star/etc.) that cannot be verified, the sole hallucination flagged. Lower temperatures (0.1) produced the most complete, least truncated outputs.
